meta_title: For Founders: passive income to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Passive Income to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on 'no project ideas.' Learn how to build passive income streams using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert-led, beginner-friendly guide.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' idea. Passive income is built by solving micro-problems for niche audiences using automated SaaS tools. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you can launch a functional, revenue-generating MVP in under 48 hours. Execution beats ideation every time.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of founders. You have the technical capacity and the drive, but you're paralyzed by the 'what.' This isn't a lack of creativity; it's a lack of a framework. You are trying to build a castle before you've even cleared the land.

We are shifting the paradigm today. Instead of chasing a billion-dollar dream, we are building automated micro-SaaS engines designed for passive income. By treating your code as an asset and your MVP as a data-gathering vessel, you bypass the 'no project ideas' trap and move straight to market validation.

steps.title: Identify a High-Intent Niche
steps.description: Focus on 'boring' problems—those where people are already paying for inefficient solutions. Search platforms like Reddit or niche forums for recurring 'how do I' complaints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS researcher. Analyze the following problem: [Insert Problem]. Generate 3 micro-SaaS feature sets that solve this for a recurring subscription model.
steps.claude_code_command: claude research --topic 'recurring user pain points in [niche]'

steps.title: Architect the MVP Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the core boilerplate. Focus on authentication and a simple database schema so you can collect user data immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Next.js application with Supabase auth and Stripe integration. Include a landing page, a user dashboard, and a protected API route.

steps.title: Automate the Value Delivery
steps.description: The 'passive' in passive income comes from automation. Use Claude Code to build a script that processes user input and returns value without manual intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an automated service that processes user uploads and returns a PDF report. Use OpenAI API for the logic.

steps.title: Implement Stripe Revenue Hooks
steps.description: Don't build until you can charge. Set up webhook listeners to handle successful payments and grant access to your service.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Stripe webhook handler for Node.js that updates a user's subscription status in the Supabase 'profiles' table upon payment success.

steps.title: Deploy and Iterate
steps.description: Deploy to Vercel or Railway. Use real-world usage data to decide if you should pivot or scale the feature set.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment checklist for a Vercel production environment, including environment variables and database migrations.

pro_tips: Build for the 'Search Intent'—if people are Googling the problem, they are ready to pay for the solution.
Prioritize Stripe integration over UI polish; users pay for utility, not rounded corners.
Use Claude Code to write your unit tests; it reduces post-launch maintenance to near zero.
Keep your database schema thin; complex data models kill speed-to-market.
Launch on Product Hunt only after you've had at least 5 organic users—it acts as your social proof.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, set up a simple analytics dashboard to track conversions. If you hit 10 paying users, double down on SEO content for your landing page to trigger the flywheel effect.
content.conversion_block: Stop overthinking and start shipping. Every day you wait is a day of lost revenue. You have the tools, the blueprint, and the expertise. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
